approval.rejectModalPlaceholder: e.g., Business peak hours, strictly prohibit database upgrade...
approval.payloadTip: Tip: If you click approve on the top right, the backend will call this interface again with the frozen data to complete the actual business.

backup.title: System Backup & Restore
backup.restoreSuccessTip: Data has been restored to the backup point
backup.restoreWarning: This will overwrite current data. This action is irreversible!
backup.tipDesc: Backup includes all business data (users, roles, pipelines, configs, etc.), excluding execution logs and audit logs. Encrypted fields (credentials, keys, etc.) will be re-encrypted with the current instance key.
backup.uploadTip: Click or drag to upload .json.gz backup file
backup.uploadHint: Only gzip-compressed JSON format backup files are supported
backup.deleteWarning: Deleted backups cannot be recovered. Confirm deletion?
